Bash(python << 'EOF'
import fitz  # PyMuPDF
import os

pdf_path = "D:/SFK背提/建立网站/2024深圳背提活动总览.pdf"
output_dir = "D:/claude/portfolio_website/images"

# 打开 PDF
doc = fitz.open\(pdf_path\)
print\(f"PDF 共 {len\(doc\)} 页"\)

# 提取所有图片
img_count = 0
for page_num in range\(len\(doc\)\):
    page = doc[page_num]
    images = page.get_images\(\)
    
    for img_index, img in enumerate\(images\):
        xref = img[0]
        base_image = doc.extract_image\(xref\)
        image_bytes = base_image["image"]
        image_ext = base_image["ext"]
        
        # 保存图片
        img_filename = f"extracted_{img_count+1}.{image_ext}"
        img_path = os.path.join\(output_dir, img_filename\)
        
        with open\(img_path, "wb"\) as f:
            f.write\(image_bytes\)
        
        img_count += 1
        print\(f"提取图片: {img_filename}"\)

print\(f"\\n共提取 {img_count} 张图片"\)
doc.close\(\)
EOF)

Bash(python << 'EOF'
import fitz

pdf_path = "D:/SFK背提/建立网站/2024深圳背提活动总览.pdf"
doc = fitz.open\(pdf_path\)

print\("PDF 页面内容预览：\\n"\)
for page_num in range\(len\(doc\)\):
    page = doc[page_num]
    text = page.get_text\(\)
    # 只打印前200个字符
    preview = text[:300].replace\('\\n', ' '\)
    print\(f"第 {page_num+1} 页: {preview}..."\)
    print\("-" * 60\)

doc.close\(\)
EOF)

Bash(python << 'EOF'
import fitz
import os
from PIL import Image
import io

pdf_path = "D:/SFK背提/建立网站/2024深圳背提活动总览.pdf"
output_dir = "D:/claude/portfolio_website/images"

doc = fitz.open\(pdf_path\)

# 项目页面映射 \(PDF页码从0开始\)
# 第3-9页是公益项目1-7，第11-17页是实践项目8-14
project_pages = {
    2: 1,   # 第3页 -> 项目1
    3: 2,   # 第4页 -> 项目2
    4: 3,   # 第5页 -> 项目3
    5: 4,   # 第6页 -> 项目4
    7: 5,   # 第8页 -> 项目5 \(梅沙艺术中心\)
    6: 6,   # 第7页 -> 项目6 \(冬日暖意\)
    8: 7,   # 第9页 -> 项目7
    10: 8,  # 第11页 -> 项目8
    11: 9,  # 第12页 -> 项目9
    12: 10, # 第13页 -> 项目10
    13: 11, # 第14页 -> 项目11
    14: 12, # 第15页 -> 项目12
    15: 13, # 第16页 -> 项目13
    16: 14, # 第17页 -> 项目14
}

for page_num, project_id in project_pages.items\(\):
    page = doc[page_num]
    images = page.get_images\(full=True\)
    
    if not images:
        print\(f"项目 {project_id}: 无图片"\)
        continue
    
    # 找出最大的图片
    largest_img = None
    largest_size = 0
    
    for img in images:
        xref = img[0]
        base_image = doc.extract_image\(xref\)
        image_bytes = base_image["image"]
        
        # 计算图片大小
        size = len\(image_bytes\)
        if size > largest_size:
            largest_size = size
            largest_img = base_image
    
    if largest_img:
        # 保存为 jpg 格式
        img_data = largest_img["image"]
        ext = largest_img["ext"]
        
        # 转换为 JPG
        try:
            pil_img = Image.open\(io.BytesIO\(img_data\)\)
            output_path = os.path.join\(output_dir, f"project-{project_id}.jpg"\)
            pil_img.convert\("RGB"\).save\(output_path, "JPEG", quality=90\)
            print\(f"项目 {project_id}: 已保存 project-{project_id}.jpg \({largest_size} bytes\)"\)
        except Exception as e:
            # 如果无法转换，直接保存原格式
            output_path = os.path.join\(output_dir, f"project-{project_id}.{ext}"\)
            with open\(output_path, "wb"\) as f:
                f.write\(img_data\)
            print\(f"项目 {project_id}: 已保存 project-{project_id}.{ext}"\)

doc.close\(\)
print\("\\n图片提取完成!"\)
EOF)

Bash(python << 'EOF'
import fitz
import os
from PIL import Image
import io

pdf_path = "D:/SFK背提/建立网站/2024深圳背提活动总览.pdf"
output_dir = "D:/claude/portfolio_website/images"

doc = fitz.open\(pdf_path\)

# 项目页面映射
project_pages = {
    2: 1, 3: 2, 4: 3, 5: 4, 7: 5, 6: 6, 8: 7,
    10: 8, 11: 9, 12: 10, 13: 11, 14: 12, 15: 13, 16: 14
}

for page_num, project_id in project_pages.items\(\):
    page = doc[page_num]
    images = page.get_images\(full=True\)
    
    if not images:
        print\(f"项目 {project_id}: 无图片"\)
        continue
    
    img_count = 0
    for img in images:
        xref = img[0]
        base_image = doc.extract_image\(xref\)
        image_bytes = base_image["image"]
        
        # 过滤太小的图片（小于 10KB 可能是图标）
        if len\(image_bytes\) < 10000:
            continue
        
        img_count += 1
        ext = base_image["ext"]
        
        try:
            pil_img = Image.open\(io.BytesIO\(image_bytes\)\)
            output_path = os.path.join\(output_dir, f"project-{project_id}-{img_count}.jpg"\)
            pil_img.convert\("RGB"\).save\(output_path, "JPEG", quality=85\)
            print\(f"项目 {project_id}: project-{project_id}-{img_count}.jpg"\)
        except Exception as e:
            print\(f"项目 {project_id} 图片 {img_count} 保存失败: {e}"\)

doc.close\(\)
print\("\\n多图提取完成!"\)
EOF)
